force_post.description: Whether or not the hold was forced (spending controls ignored)

hold_id.description: The uuid of the hold (pending transaction) that this transaction originated from, if any.

lines.description: The set of accounting entries associated with this transaction. For example, a debit to a customer account will have a corresponding credit in a general ledger account.

memo.description: A short note to the recipient

original_trx.description: The "original" transaction that this transaction is related to. This is only populated in the case of reversed transactions.

user_data.description: An unstructured JSON blob representing additional transaction information specific to each payment rail.
